/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX11.3.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/src/BoidGenTemp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/src/visual/Callbacks.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/src/visual/Earth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/src/visual/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/src/visual/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/src/visual/BoidRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/shaders/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/external/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/external/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/external/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/external/imgui/imgui_demo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/external/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/external/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/Boids.dir/external/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o -o Boids  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib -framework OpenGL
